markdownRemark.html:
What we will make?

We’re gonna create a Game Management List! You can store all your favorite games in one list for easy reference, you can review them yourself, give it scores, comments, the console you used

Creating our enviroment.

We will use Create React App for this project:

npx create-react-app react-redux-games-list-management
cd react-redux-games-list-management
npm start

We erase all the files inside src folder until it looks like this:

  • src

    • App.js
    • index.js
    • serviceWorker.js

Now lets install redux!

yarn add redux react-redux

Now lets build our folder’s structure, since its a small project, we will keep it simple for now.

  • src

    • actions

    • components

      • button
      • modal
      • searchbar
      • table
      • toolbar
    • pages
    • reducers
    • store
    • types
    • App.js
    • index.js

For store we will rewrite it like this:

Provide wraps App and gives it access to the store. For now this is enough setup to get started with our project in the next section.

Lets create our service!

We’re going to use a tool called JSON Server

Starting the project!

We be building a game list management system

Conclusion

Eng Adrian Beria.
